The '''Brionelle Memorial Military Academy''' was established to supplement the planet [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila's]] [[Chandrila Defense Fleet|Defense Fleet]], and was responsible for training nearly all of the fleet's [[Officer/Legends|officers]].

==History==
The Academy was named after [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Brionelle]], the famous commander of the [[Chandrila Orbital Station]] who died during the [[Battle of the Red Reaper|Battle of the ''Red Reaper'']] during the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Galactic Cold War]] of [[3642 BBY]].<ref name="SoR" />

The Academy's program consisted of a two year training in leadership and ethics, team work and small-unit tactics. Following successful completion of this program, cadets went on to specialize in either the Army or Navy. Graduates of the Academy served in the Chandrilan Security Force and the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]], though their skills in debate led many to desert the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] in favor of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="SoR" />

Following the [[Battle of Calamari]], [[Arhul Hextrophon/Legends|Arhul Hextrophon]] gave a speech at the Academy on [[World Devastator]]s.<ref name="DarkEmpireSourcebook">''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]''</ref>
